name: VirTra, Inc
business: VirTra, Inc. is a global provider of judgmental use of force training simulators and firearms training simulators for the law enforcement, military, and commercial markets. The Company's patented technologies, software, and scenarios provide intense training for de-escalation, judgmental use-of-force, marksmanship and related training that mimics real-world situations.

exposures.sentence: VirTra, Inc. (the Company, VirTra, we, us and our ), located in Chandler, Arizona, is a global provider of judgmental use of force training simulators and firearms training simulators for the law enforcement, military, and commercial markets.

We have developed a higher standard in simulation training including capabilities such as multi-screen, video-based scenarios, unique scenario authoring ability, superior training scenarios, the patented Threat-Fire shoot-back system, powerful gas-powered simulated recoil weapons, and more.
V-XR is an extended reality headset-based training solution.

We also intend to leverage advancements in artificial intelligence and large language models to enhance realism, improve user interaction and client relatability, and reduce development time and costs across our product portfolio.
Uncertainty in the development, deployment, and use of AI in our products and services, as well as our business more broadly, could adversely affect our business and reputation.
